emails.subject: Re: Meeting w/Sempra
emails.body: Re: Meeting w/Sempra sounds good. I think we should not talk about the conversations with the governor . I'd rather not prompt them to go to the gov (presumably to object to the gov talking to us without talking to them at the same time). Jeff Dasovich Sent by: Jeff Dasovich 10/11/2000 02:54 PM
